texto: The only way to predict the future is to create it. You don't let it happen. You make it happen. How? Stop regretting the past and start learning from it. Let go of guilt by leaning into God's grace. Quit beating yourself up and let the Spirit of God heal your heart. You cannot divorce yourself from the past. You are married to it forever. But God wants to reconcile your past by redeeming it. God is in the recycling business
autor: He makes recycled goods out of wasted lives.
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de He makes recycled goods out of wasted lives. que provoca limites e escolhas conscientes. Ao questionar “The only way to predict the future is to create it. You don't let it happen. You make it happen. …”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre fe, mark-batterson, reflexao, com foco em reflexao.
